aboutContent.headline: I build software that earns trust in production.
aboutContent.subline: Full stack engineer focused on architecture, delivery, and pragmatic leadership across product, platform, and teams.
aboutContent.bioShort: I work across frontend, backend, and cloud systems to turn ambiguous goals into software that ships, scales, and stays maintainable. I care about clear communication, practical design decisions, and helping teams deliver with confidence.
aboutContent.locationLine: Based in Los Angeles, open to on-site, hybrid, and remote collaboration.
principles: Favor observability and reliability from day one
Keep users, stakeholders, and teammates aligned

cards.title: Systems Design
cards.body: From API boundaries to UI state, I design systems that stay understandable and resilient as products evolve.

cards.title: Product Delivery
cards.body: I turn vague requirements into shipped features while balancing speed, quality, and long-term maintainability.

cards.title: Team Leadership
cards.body: I mentor engineers through architecture and debugging practices that raise delivery confidence across the whole team.

cards.title: Performance & Reliability
cards.body: I care deeply about production behavior: instrumentation, bottleneck removal, and systems that stay calm under load.

proofPoints: Built and led end-to-end web platforms spanning UI, APIs, cloud services, and CI/CD.
Delivered automation and product systems used by global teams in enterprise environments.
Improved team velocity through architecture guidance, code standards, and mentoring.
Comfortable owning both technical direction and hands-on delivery.
aboutContent.callToAction: Open to senior and lead full stack roles where architecture quality and product impact both matter.
